name: Soft Warning Integration
description: Tests that an active process prints a 'Soft Arbitration WARNING' to standard error if its hard duration timeout is reached and the broker forcibly reassigns the lease to another agent (Arbitration Pre-emption).

steps.comment: 1. Agent A requests a deliberately short lease (2 seconds maximum execution)
2. Agent B queues up as a blocker.
Allow broker time to register B in the queue
3. Agent A's shim command runs for 12 seconds.
4. Verify the system survived and Agent B acquired it, then Watchdog organically claimed B back to FREE because B lacked a heartbeat for 12s.
